title: Ryko Vant
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:RykoVant.jpg]] |name=Ryko Vant |homeworld= |birth= |death=Between [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], [[Jerne]]"[[Dark Knight's Devilry]]" depicts [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] using [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|father's lightsaber]], which he gained in [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] and lost in [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. As ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates ''A New Hope''{{'s}} end to [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and ''The Empire Strikes Back'' to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], "Dark Knight's Devilry," which includes the [[Death/Legends|death]] of Meeka Reen on [[Jerne]], must take place between those two [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{StoryCite|story=Dark Knight's Devilry|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I... ''had'' them, Lord Vader! Luke Skywalker... Leia Organa... I ''captured'' them!"
"True... I did not expect you to be so efficient. But you did lose them immediately afterwards. That I ''expected.''|Ryko Vant and Darth Vader|}} [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Ryko Vant''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Jerne]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The commander of the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial forces]] at [[Jerne City H.Q.]], Vant at one point after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] managed to [[Mission to Jerne|capture]] major [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], but was assaulted by guerrillas led by [[Meeka Reen]] before he could take them into custody. Vant fled in terror back to Jerne City on a [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]] as his [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] were slaughtered, where he was confronted by the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], who had come to Jerne to spring a trap of his own—he intended to lure Skywalker and Organa into an ambush at [[Adony Station]] with rumors of a powerful artifact called the "[[Eternity Crystal]]." Vant accompanied Vader to Adony Station to watch the Rebels' demise, but Skywalker turned the tables and [[Death/Legends|killed]] Vant with a [[Proton grenade/Legends|proton grenade]]. ==Behind the scenes== Ryko Vant first appeared in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] "[[Dark Knight's Devilry]]," which was written by [[Steve Moore]], illustrated by [[Alan Davis]], and first published in the [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 153]] in [[January]] [[1982]].''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Original Marvel Years Vol. 3]]'' ==Appearances== *{{StoryCite|story=Dark Knight's Devilry|book=The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 153|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Ryko Vant}} {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Vant, Ryko}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Officers of the Galactic Empire]]
